alerts.headline: 🏦 FOMC MEETING in 7d (May 6-7): Fed rate decision — gold sensitive to rate path guidance amid tariff-driven inflation
alerts.detail: Fed caught between tariff-driven inflation (hawkish) and slowing growth (dovish). Gold benefits if Fed pauses or signals cuts.

alerts.headline: TCMB Gold Sales Trigger Sharp Global Price Drop: FT - paturkey.com
📉 RSI APPROACHING OVERSOLD: Gold RSI at 39.1 — historically precedes mean-reversion bounces
alerts.detail: RSI in the 30-40 range has historically preceded gold price rebounds. Watch for a reversal signal. Current RSI: 39.1

alerts.headline: ⚠️ BELOW 50-DAY MA: Gold at $4,611 trading under 50-DMA ($4,855) — watch for support
alerts.detail: Price below 50-day moving average can signal short-term bearish momentum.

alerts.headline: 🟡 ATH PULLBACK: Gold is 13.3% below its all-time high of $5,318 — historically a re-entry zone
alerts.detail: Gold set its ATH of $5,318 on 2026-01-29. Pullbacks of 8-20% below ATH have historically been strong accumulation opportunities in bull markets.
